scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=2115552010 3025757161 2751 IN IP4 192.168.10.89 s=SIP Call RV XT5000 c=IN IP4 192.168.10.89 b=AS:6144 t=0 0 k=key:3B0BB92B5E8E8E9AD0B84F7A7DF011D27C054796A00D14434A4B729064767991CA9D0C0DFE7B73DDC13E559DAC155BD1C5A33A148FC8987FD769C9CD5C31F4941D768C933EC92B158CBDD28260C337E8D84938D67157DBBA77BE5657D944F7C0F814378B619BBF34040892DE87DE27165F62B350C60E3E5EA52E55EB62DCA323 m=audio 3278 RTP/AVP 9 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:KRhUGVBO0no+1RDyHStupKKib5cNXOfmvNJjZZfi UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:KRhUGVBO0no+1RDyHStupKKib5cNXOfmvNJjZZfi UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv m=video 3280 RTP/AVP 97 34 b=TIAS:6144000 a=content:main a=label:11 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=fmtp:97 profile-level-id=42801f;packetization-mode=0;max-br=10240;max-mbps=490000;max-fs=8160 a=rtpmap:34 H263/90000 a=fmtp:34 CIF4=1;CIF=1;QCIF=1;SQCIF=1 a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:e8H60NpLHq3FXILVTp8BvUOjX7M6bA8hU8vztjCK UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:e8H60NpLHq3FXILVTp8BvUOjX7M6bA8hU8vztjCK UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=sendrecv

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
